root: ^In three days, the Empire will smash through this ancient fortress, decimate any resistance, and steal your people's freedom forever.

^Muster your forces, prepare defences, rally allies to your banner. Do everything in your power to halt the Empire's advance. Succeed and be venerated in the halls of your people as a great hero of this age. Fail and be forgotten.

contact_allies: ^You order a messenger ride south, for the dwarven Lord of Glasspeak. Only time will tell if aid will come.
prepare_battlements: ^You instruct your forces to make repairs to the ancient walls of the tower. It will be ready to meet the Empire's forces.
prepared: ^You have done all you can for now. Now, you must wait...
